mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_ID, VALUE_TYPE, JSON_INDEX_MODE, INDEXED_JSON_FIELDS FROM LOOKUP_GROUP_EXTRA
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOOKUP_GROUP_EXTRA (GROUP_ID, VALUE_TYPE, JSON_INDEX_MODE, INDEXED_JSON_FIELDS) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{valueType}, #{jsonIndexMode}, #{indexedJsonFields}::jsonb)
mapper.update: UPDATE LOOKUP_GROUP_EXTRA SET VALUE_TYPE = #{valueType}, JSON_INDEX_MODE = #{jsonIndexMode}, INDEXED_JSON_FIELDS = #{indexedJsonFields}::jsonb WHERE GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
